title: PM Monday
intro: Your week, assembled: what shipped, where the roadmap stands, and the update your stakeholders need — one artifact, one command.

sections.heading: This week's stakeholder update
sections.prompt: Draft this week's stakeholder update. INPUT (paste your raw notes/metrics, or wire this to a source): {{notes}}. If inputs are missing, produce a clearly-labelled TEMPLATE with [FILL IN] rather than inventing facts.

sections.heading: Roadmap health check
sections.prompt: Give a short roadmap health read for the current quarter from: {{roadmap}}. Flag slippage and the one sequencing risk. Mark unknowns [FILL IN].

sections.heading: The one decision to force this week
sections.prompt: From the current backlog: {{backlog}} — surface the single highest-leverage item to push and why. If the backlog isn't provided, output the framework and what to gather.
